node.statement: Monthly calendar view layout & interaction — In the Builder's monthly Timeline view: (a) NO vertical scroll — all month day cards fit in one compact 7-column grid on screen (refer to v0.1.4 docs/archive/dcx-manager-v0.1.4/src/pages/builder/timeline/MonthlyView.tsx for the clean monthly grid); (b) day cards are compact (more compact than weekly); (c) the task-card EXPANDED state is DISABLED in monthly — tasks render only as small compact cards; (d) editing a task is via long-click on the small task card, which opens the Task Editor; (e) opening the editor must NOT push the day cards off-screen — the day grid shrinks further so the whole month stays visible while the editor is open. Current MonthlyView uses overflow-y-auto (vertical scroll) — this requirement supersedes that.
